context: MEGA wave: 56 additive tasks (innomcp ship-prep tests+docs, ecc adoption hooks/skills, 14 organ docs, UX specs, security finish). Routed through local proxy http://127.0.0.1:4322/v1. All additive/low-risk; SA review + tsc-gate before any commit.

members.task: Output ONLY raw TypeScript (no markdown fences, no commentary, start with the import line). Write a Playwright spec using @playwright/test for innomcp at http://localhost:3000. Project innomcp: Next.js 14 app-router frontend (innomcp-next, :3000), Express/Node22 backend (innomcp-node, REST at :3015 in docker / :3011 in container, WS too), MariaDB :3308, Redis, pnpm workspaces, Playwright e2e in tests/e2e/tests/ (use @playwright/test, baseURL http://localhost:3000, viewport via test.use). Chat UI route /living-chat, login /login, dashboard /dashboard. Thai+English UI. Browser-reachable backend via NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:3015. Onboarding modal has a "ข้าม" skip button. Components under innomcp-next/src/app/components/chat/. Spec focus: login page renders form, invalid creds shows Thai error, login form has email+password fields, navigating to /login from guest shows login CTA. Use test.describe, test.use({ viewport: { width: 1440, height: 900 } }), each test self-contained (own page.goto, dismiss onboarding by clicking text "ข้าม" wrapped in try/catch), test.setTimeout(30000). Assertions must be resilient (use getByRole/getByText, waitForTimeout where needed, tolerate guest mode). Strict TypeScript, typed arrays. 3-6 tests covering happy path + one edge case.

Output ONLY raw TypeScript (no fences). Write a vitest/jest-agnostic unit test using node:test + node:assert for an Express rate limiter middleware. Standalone, runnable with: node --test.

Output ONLY raw JavaScript (no fences), node shebang + comment. Target: Jit oracle (Claude Code project on Windows + Git Bash, hooks under .githooks/ or .claude/hooks/, node v20+ available, bash available). Hooks are Claude Code settings.json hooks OR git hooks — specify which. Keep cross-platform (Windows path-safe, no /tmp hardcode — use os.tmpdir()). Write .claude/hooks/session-start.js: a Claude Code SessionStart hook (reads hook JSON from stdin, writes context to stdout) that loads bounded prior context (<=8000 chars, env ECC_SESSION_START_MAX_CHARS override) from the most recent file under ψ/inbox/handoff/ and the latest ψ/memory/retrospectives entry, plus git last-commit line. Output a concise context block. Fail-safe (never throw, empty output on error). Under 90 lines.

Includes: pending git status summary (via child_process git status --short), last 5 commits, a placeholder for the model to fill. Fail-safe. Under 90 lines.

If tsc fails, print the errors and exit 2 (block). Skip silently if no ts files touched or no tsconfig. Under 80 lines.

Output ONLY raw markdown. Write docs/token-economy.md for Jit. Thai. The provider ladder: CommandCode (bulk codegen, via proxy :4322) -> Haiku subagent (cheap exploration/tool-use) -> Sonnet subagent (complex code/analysis) -> Fable 5 main loop (orchestration + SA review ONLY). Settings: CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL=haiku, MAX_THINKING_TOKENS~10000. When to use which. A cost-discipline checklist. Reference the rule that Fable 5 must not be burned on mechanical work. Under 90 lines.

Project innomcp: Next.js 14 app-router frontend (innomcp-next, :3000), Express/Node22 backend (innomcp-node, REST at :3015 in docker / :3011 in container, WS too), MariaDB :3308, Redis, pnpm workspaces, Playwright e2e in tests/e2e/tests/ (use @playwright/test, baseURL http://localhost:3000, viewport via test.use). Chat UI route /living-chat, login /login, dashboard /dashboard. Thai+English UI. Browser-reachable backend via NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:3015. Onboarding modal has a "ข้าม" skip button. Components under innomcp-next/src/app/components/chat/. Write a UX spec for: loading skeletons. Replace bare "Loading…" text (e.g. Agent Leaderboard "Loading… · Refreshing in 26s") with skeleton placeholders matching final layout to reduce perceived latency. Thai + English terms. Include: problem, proposed solution, component-level changes (which files under innomcp-next/src/app/components/), acceptance criteria, edge cases. This is a proposal for review, do not assume it is applied. Under 80 lines.
